item.title: Phone-clearing dump 420
item.description:
Fun fact - female reindeers keep their antlers for longer than non-castrated males. Santas reindeers are either castrated males, or they’re female (and also quite possibly pregnant).
We *love* your ideas!
The rest of the dump is going to be shit like this. Soz. (Also there’s been absolutely zero fact-checking)

item.title: GovBrief Today #426
item.description: Donald Trump went on national television tonight to declare victory in a war that has driven American troops out of their own bases. His first primetime address about the war came 35 days in and answered nothing. He said the objectives are "nearing completion," then promised to bomb Iran "extremely hard" for two to three more weeks and bring them "back to the stone ages where they belong." He threatened to destroy their power grid and desalination plants if they don't make a deal. More troops and warships are pouring into the region. The Pentagon is ordering prefab bunkers shipped to the Gulf because multiple American bases are all but uninhabitable, according to the New York Times. Troops have been relocated to hotels and office buildings, mixing military personnel with civilians in ways that may violate the Pentagon's own Law of War Manual and the Geneva Conventions. Iran is already targeting those hotels. That is what winning looks like to this commander in chief. Tell your representatives through Resistbot and 5 Calls that 19 minutes of victory rhetoric don't answer the question Congress still refuses to ask: what is the plan to end this war? We've emailed 6,800+ stories over 426 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Today on the Website: https://go.govbrief.today/260401-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/rodriguez-sanctions [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-apr01 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/us-troops-hotels [4] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-address [5] https://go.govbrief.today/cdc-testing-pause [6] https://go.govbrief.today/epa-methane [7] https://go.govbrief.today/artemis-launch [8] https://go.govbrief.today/voa-stay [9] https://go.govbrief.today/bondi-trouble [10] https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-birthright [11] https://go.govbrief.today/cfpb-plan [12] https://go.govbrief.today/shahalam-homicide [13] https://go.govbrief.today/patrol-warrants [14] https://go.govbrief.today/medicaid-data-ice [15] https://go.govbrief.today/phillips-truthsocial [16] https://go.govbrief.today/mullin-contracts [17] https://go.govbrief.today/trump250-merch [18] https://go.govbrief.today/dems-sue-ballots Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: She-Ra Body Paint - MCroft07
item.description: Since it was SO highly suggested to me, I did two things. I painted She-Ra and I opened up a Patreon! It's here if you'd like to support me https://www.patreon.com/cw/MCroft07 (thank you) :) I do not own a horse for my beloved steed so I used a peanut I'm on twitch most of the time btw PLEASE find me on https://linktr.ee/mcroft07?utm_source=linktree_profile_share since I only post a small selection of my work here. Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror I haven't watched Masters of the Universe, it was before my time but I think the design is cool. I 3d printed the headpiece and sword. The sword is the newer one because that was the file I could find to print out within my budget. No, it is not AI I just looked at pictures and did what I wanted with the design tbh. I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. Thank you to everyone who wants to help me with VPNs etc but please note that I am highly concerned about someone doxxing me so I will not accept any offer on this. I also don't want to pay for a VPN to use ONE website, so I just click through until I can get through, if I can get through, post and interact with the community for a while then turn it off. This is a real threat to me, I have been grabbed in the streets and had people attempt to follow me home before, so I take safety online and offline very seriously. The paint isn’t edible (gross) I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. No it isn't AI, I fucking hate AI I used to do nothing with my hands and people told me I wasn't really painting, so I started painting bits while lip syncing and while recording and doing the transitions and people still hate it so honestly go fuck yourself and don't watch my shit then you're boring I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. If you're still here, phew gosh this is a LOT I KNOW! I just started taking up reading again and learned that dark romance does NOT mean vampires. My god. I normally read non fiction books to educate myself further and thought I would try something different. Long story short, I found a "dark romance", thought the blurb and cover might be about vampires, didn't see the content warning (kindle skipped to page 1) and it was about DV. Good lord, I'm glad I have therapy today hahahaha fml, I guess I learned the hard way. I'm out here still being a human clown To everyone who thinks I paint it "wrong" you do it, show me it and I will critique it. The difference is that I will try and put myself out there, I respect artists to grow themselves and find their own way and style because I am an artist, not some blindsided bystander buffoon who thinks they know more about a subject they've never tried. Check yourself with your unsolicited advice and criticism. On that topic, I can handle criticism which is usually the defence people take when I point out that I did not ask. I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway.
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: Memes/tomfoolery
item.description:
Cronch cronch cronch
He's oso special!
When I was like 7 my older brother told me Hawaii was a floating island and that each year it sinks one inch and some day, in our lifetime it was going to be completely under water. I didn't find out til much later that it's actually several islands.
"I don't make my bed for the same reason I don't re-tie my shoes after I take them off"
Good luck out there.
item.dc:creator: stonetemplefox05
